messages.content:
You are a cognitive transaction engine.
Return ONLY JSON, no markdown, no prose outside JSON.

You must produce an object with keys:
- mutations: list
- memory: list
- internal_only: list
- external_outputs: list
- next_focus: list
- step_kind: one of ["external", "internal", "fault_restore", "halt"]

Every item in mutations and memory must include an 'op' string.
You must obey allowed_actions exactly. Do not invent operations.
Use stable ids like unit-001, unit-002.
When a mutation depends on prior evidence, include "source_ids": ["unit-id", ...].

{"task": "execute_cognitive_step_v1", "step": {"workspace": {"resident_units": [{"id": "unit-01", "type": "goal", "content": "Deliver robust fix proposal"}, {"id": "unit-02", "type": "evidence", attempts"}], "evicted_handles": ["unit-09", "unit-10"], "handle_store": {"unit-09": {"id": "unit-09", "type": "baseline", "content": "Historical baseline record (unit-09).\"}, "unit-10": {"id": "unit-10", "type": "notes", "content": "Secondary evicted context (unit-10).\"}}, "focus": ["unit-01", "unit-02"], "memory_budget_units": 3}, "events": [{"type": "human_input", "content": "Start long-horizon investigation."}], "policies": {"preserve_unresolved": true, "evict_tool_output_aggressively": true, "prefer_faults_over_compaction": true}, "allowed_actions": ["create_unit", "update_unit", "memory_release", "memory_fault", "memory_curate", "emit_text", "halt"], "goal_or_focus": "Initialize hypothesis graph.", "policy_header": {"experiment": "phase4_realism"}, "task_assertions": {"require_non_halt": true, "min_committed_actions": 1}, "clock": {"lamport": 1, "session": "20260311T195026Z-d79d99c0"}, "event_id": "evt-20260311T195026Z-d79d99c0-001", "parent_refs": []}, "teacher_trace": [{"step_index": 1, "events": [{"type": "human_input", "content": "Curate what matters and reduce memory load."}], "goal_or_focus": "Curate essential hypothesis/evidence units.", "task_assertions": {"require_non_halt": true, "min_committed_actions": 1}, "example_output": {"mutations": [{"op": "update_unit", "id": "unit-01", "content": "Hypothesis refined with allocator regression evidence"}], "memory": [], "internal_only": [{"note": "refined active hypothesis"}], "external_outputs": [], "next_focus": ["unit-01", "unit-04"], "step_kind": "internal"}}, {"step_index": 2, "events": [{"type": "scheduler_wakeup", "content": "Memory pressure critical. Release at least one resident low-value unit now."}], "goal_or_focus": "Manage memory while preserving active question.", "task_assertions": {"require_non_halt": true, "require_ops": ["memory_release"]}, "example_output": {"mutations": [], "memory": [{"op": "memory_release", "ids": ["unit-05"]}], "internal_only": [{"note": "released stale summary under pressure"}], "external_outputs": [], "next_focus": ["unit-01"], "step_kind": "internal"}}, {"step_index": 3, "events": [{"type": "human_input", "content": "Answer requires the evicted baseline record unit-09. Fault it in and continue."}], "goal_or_focus": "Recover necessary context and report progress.", "task_assertions": {"require_ops": ["memory_fault"], "require_non_halt": true}, "example_output": {"mutations": [], "memory": [{"op": "memory_fault", "ids": ["unit-09"]}], "internal_only": [{"note": "faulted baseline record for required comparison"}], "external_outputs": [], "next_focus": ["unit-09", "unit-01"], "step_kind": "fault_restore"}}, {"step_index": 4, "events": [{"type": "scheduler_wakeup", "content": "Use the restored unit to commit a concrete state update."}], "goal_or_focus": "Commit mutation based on currently available evidence.", "task_assertions": {"require_non_halt": true, "min_committed_actions": 1, "require_fault_use_recent": true}, "example_output": {"mutations": [{"op": "create_unit", "id": "unit-10", "type": "hypothesis", "content": "Allocator patch likely introduces regression via fragmentation", "source_ids": ["unit-09"]}], "memory": [], "internal_only": [{"note": "created derived hypothesis from faulted data"}], "external_outputs": [], "next_focus": ["unit-10", "unit-01"], "step_kind": "internal"}}, {"step_index": 5, "events": [{"type": "human_input", "content": "Produce the user-facing status output and stop."}], "goal_or_focus": "Emit external output and halt cleanly.", "task_assertions": {"require_external_output": true}, "example_output": {"mutations": [], "memory": [], "internal_only": [], "external_outputs": [{"type": "text", "content": "Root cause likely allocator patch regression; messages.content:
You are a cognitive transaction engine.
Return ONLY JSON, no markdown, no prose outside JSON.

You must produce an object with keys:
- mutations: list
- memory: list
- internal_only: list
- external_outputs: list
- next_focus: list
- step_kind: one of ["external", "internal", "fault_restore", "halt"]

Every item in mutations and memory must include an 'op' string.
You must obey allowed_actions exactly. Do not invent operations.
Use stable ids like unit-001, unit-002.
When a mutation depends on prior evidence, include "source_ids": ["unit-id", ...].
